{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/97804977?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/BKDDFS/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/BKDDFS/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/BKDDFS/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/BKDDFS/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/BKDDFS", "id": 97804977, "login": "BKDDFS", "node_id": "U_kgDOBdRisQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/BKDDFS/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/BKDDFS/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/BKDDFS/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/BKDDFS/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/BKDDFS/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/BKDDFS", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47144", "cvss": {"score": 5.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "### Impact

A path traversal vulnerability in `shame next` allows an attacker-controlled `shamefile.yaml` to disclose contents of files outside the repository, one line at a time, to the terminal of a user who runs the command. See patch commit for technical details.

### Patches

Fixed in 0.1.7. Upgrade to either 0.1.7 or later versions to incorporate the patch.

### Workarounds

Do not run `shame next` against untrusted `shamefile.yaml`. Use `shame me --dry-run` for CI validation.

### Resources

- Patch commit: https://github.com/BKDDFS/shamefile/commit/77b0aeea318503582818c708518c601fedc43557
- Pull request: https://github.com/BKDDFS/shamefile/pull/80
- Release: https://github.com/BKDDFS/shamefile/releases/tag/v0.1.7
- [CWE-22: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')](https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/22.html)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00013, "percentile": 0.02254}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-x6p3-76f2-xxvh", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-28T20:02:14Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x6p3-76f2-xxvh", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-x6p3-76f2-xxvh"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47144"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-28T20:02:14Z", "references": ["https://github.com/BKDDFS/shamefile/security/advisories/GHSA-x6p3-76f2-xxvh", "https://github.com/BKDDFS/shamefile/pull/80", "https://github.com/BKDDFS/shamefile/commit/77b0aeea318503582818c708518c601fedc43557", "https://github.com/BKDDFS/shamefile/releases/tag/v0.1.7", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x6p3-76f2-xxvh"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/BKDDFS/shamefile/security-advisories/GHSA-x6p3-76f2-xxvh", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/BKDDFS/shamefile", "summary": "Shamefile has an arbitrary file read via shamefile.yaml in shame next", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-28T20:02:16Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-x6p3-76f2-xxvh", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.1.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "shamefile"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.1.6"}, {"first_patched_version": "0.1.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "shamefile"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.1.6"}, {"first_patched_version": "0.1.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "shamefile"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.1.6"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Shamefile has an arbitrary file read via shamefile.yaml in shame next
